Motion For A Protective Order
Off Calendar Apr-20-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Patrick J. Torsney; Law Offices of Patrick J. Torsney; 310-486-7373; appearing via CourtCall on behalf of defendants Gaetani Real Estate and The Columbia Apartments, LLC.
Gregory J. Brod; Brod Law Firm, PC; 415-397-1130; appearing via Zoom on behalf of plaintiffs Alison Ramos and Steven Petsche.

Plaintiff's counsel contests the court's tentative ruling, and requests that the court hear their motion on it's merits at today's hearing. Counsel for both sides state that they agreed amongst themselves to have the motion heard on shortened time. The court makes note that there was no order shortening time entered. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS GAETANI REAL ESTATE AND COLUMBIA APARTMENTS, LLC'S MOTION FOR A PROTECTIVE ORDER is OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice. (CCP 1005(b).) Motion filed April 18, 2022.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
